naturalLanguageQuery: show me secure development controls along with related FAQs
generatedSQL:
SELECT 
  c."short", 
  f."question"
FROM 
  "allTrustControls" c
JOIN 
  "allTrustFaqs" f ON c."category" = f."category"
WHERE 
  c."category" ILIKE 'Secure Development';
expectedSQL: SELECT c."short", c."long", f."question", f."answer" FROM "allTrustControls" c LEFT JOIN "allTrustFaqs" f ON c."category" = f."category" WHERE c."category" = 'Secure Development';
